title: Irish Pilaf with Prosciutto
description: A flavorful pilaf dish from Ireland, featuring crispy prosciutto and a delicate floral note.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add prosciutto and cook until crispy, about 4-5 minutes.
Remove prosciutto from skillet and set aside.
Add pilaf mix to skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add water to skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Return prosciutto to skillet and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
